# Swim Trainer — AnalyticsZone

> Plan, execute, and analyze structured swim workouts with professional precision — for coaches and swimmers, with privacy-first, on-device data handling.

Swim Trainer helps coaches and swimmers optimize performance through data-driven workout planning: build structured sets, execute them in the pool, and analyze the results.

## Key pages

- [Features](https://swimtrainer.analyticszone.app/en/features/): Workout builder, execution mode, and analysis tools.
- [Use Cases](https://swimtrainer.analyticszone.app/en/use-cases/): How coaches, squads, and self-coached swimmers use Swim Trainer.
- [Who It's For](https://swimtrainer.analyticszone.app/en/who-its-for/): Coaches, competitive swimmers, and triathletes.
- [FAQ](https://swimtrainer.analyticszone.app/en/faq/): Common questions.
- [Pricing](https://swimtrainer.analyticszone.app/en/pricing/): Plans and free trial.

## Key facts

- Swim Trainer separates planning (structured sets with target paces), execution (in-pool guidance), and analysis (comparing planned vs actual).
- Workout data is processed on-device, following the AnalyticsZone privacy-first policy; no cloud uploads.
- It complements Swim Analytics (https://swim.analyticszone.app), which covers CSS and swim training load metrics.
